title: lepidium montanum subsp. cinereum
intro: Lepidium montanum subsp. cinereum is a subspecies of the mountain pepperwort plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its high concentration of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lepidium montanum subsp. cinereum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a food ingredient, adding a peppery flavor to dishes.
